name: resume-tailor
description: Hybrid AI + manual workflow for tailored resumes, rendered through a Typst microservice.

scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile ollama down && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile ollama build --no-cache && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile ollama up -d
scripts.docker:rebuild:compiler: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml stop compiler && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml rm -f compiler && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml build --no-cache compiler && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d compiler
scripts.docker:pull:ollama-model: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile ollama exec ollama ollama pull ${OLLAMA_MODEL:-qwen2.5:7b-instruct}
scripts.docker:nuke: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile ollama down -v --rmi local --remove-orphans
